calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Continued To Jul-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for status of close of estate and order to show cause.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Brian M. Wagner for Kate Chadd, Executor to appear on July 13, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear and for failure to file status of close of estate. Status on filing of an accounting by the executor is also continued to that date.

Judge: Michael McNaughton; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Continued To Jul-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for status of close of estate and order to show cause.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Brian M. Wagner for Kate Chadd, Executor to appear on July 13, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear and for failure to file status of close of estate. Judge: Michael McNaughton; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-30-2026 Continued To Jun-01-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The matter was called for Status on Close of Estate. No appearances were made by any party or counsel.

The Court continued the matter to June 1, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, and stated that an Order to Show Cause re Sanctions shall issue to attorney Brian M. Wagner for failure to appear.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-26-2026 Continued To Mar-30-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-13-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated February 1, 2019, is admitted to probate. Kate Chadd is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for January 26, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
